questions.question: Which Indian Standard (IS) Codes are adopted for performing the vee bee consistometer test and apparatus specifications respectively?

explanations.a: Correct! IS 1199 covers the test procedure and IS 10510 covers the apparatus specifications.
explanations.c: Incorrect. IS 5515 is for compaction factor apparatus, not Vee Bee.
explanations.d: Incorrect. IS 7320 is not relevant here.

answers.a: Time taken in remoulding of specimen from cylinder to cone
answers.b: Time taken in remoulding of specimen from cone to frustum
answers.c: Time taken in remoulding of specimen from frustum to cylinder
answers.d: Time taken in compacting the specimen in layers.

explanations.a: Incorrect. The remoulding is from cone shape to cylinder, not the reverse.
explanations.b: Incorrect. The specimen is remoulded from cone to cylinder, not frustum.
explanations.c: Correct! Vee Bee time is the time taken for the concrete to remould from a conical (frustum) shape to a cylindrical shape under vibration.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Vee Bee time measures remoulding time, not compaction time.

questions.question: Vee bee test is used to assess workability when slump height is limited to?

explanations.b: Correct! For concrete with slump exceeding 50 mm, the remoulding occurs too rapidly for measurement.

questions.question: Which of the following statement is incorrect?

answers.a: As slump increases, Vee bee time decreases as it becomes easier for concrete to flow.
answers.b: As slump increases, Vee bee time also increases.
answers.c: As slump increases, the compaction factor increases.
answers.d: As slump increases, degree of workability also improves from very low to high

explanations.a: This statement is correct. Higher slump means more workable concrete which remoulds faster.
explanations.b: Correct! This is the INCORRECT statement. As slump increases, Vee bee time actually decreases because more workable concrete remoulds faster.
explanations.c: This statement is correct. Higher slump correlates with higher compaction factor.
explanations.d: This statement is correct. Higher slump indicates better workability.

questions.question: Which test is most suitable for concrete of very low workability?

explanations.a: Incorrect. While compaction factor test is used for low workability, the Vee Bee test is most suitable for very low workability.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Slump test is not suitable for low workability concrete.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Kelly Ball test is used for medium to high workability concrete.
explanations.d: Correct! The Vee Bee test is most suitable for concrete with very low workability as it uses vibration to assess consistency.

questions.question: How addition of pozzolans in concrete mix affects it?

explanations.a: Partially correct. Pozzolans do improve workability, but they also have other benefits.
explanations.b: Partially correct. Pozzolans do improve chemical resistance, but they also have other benefits.
explanations.c: Correct! Pozzolans improve both workability and resistance to chemical attack in concrete.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Pozzolans have beneficial effects on concrete.
